program_overview.definition: Interdisciplinary degree preparing students for careers in business, industry, and academia.
program_overview.curriculum: Required HCI courses, electives from variety of disciplines, and dissertation research.

credit_requirements.isu_residency_credits: At least 36 graduate credits (including all research credits) must be earned at ISU.

residency_requirement.expectation: Expected to reside at Iowa State University in Ames, Iowa, for duration of program.
residency_requirement.enrollment_rule: Must be enrolled as full-time, on-campus students for at least 36 credits.
residency_requirement.dissertation_research: All credits must be earned at ISU under supervision of Academic Plan Committee.
residency_requirement.exceptions: Must be discussed with HCI Supervisory Committee.

major_professor_requirement.to_apply: Not required to have major professor or advisor to apply.
major_professor_requirement.process: Application shared with all HCI faculty. Students then encouraged to contact faculty with aligned interests.

admissions.decision_process: Made by individual HCI faculty members, not an admissions committee.
admissions.gpa_requirement: Students with undergraduate GPA below 3.0 are NOT accepted.

options: Submit official scores from approved English language exams.
Earn a degree (bachelor's, master's, doctoral) from a country where English is the only official language (degree must be conferred at time of application).

financial_support.assistantship_eligibility: All admitted HCI PhD students receive a half-time graduate research assistantship.
financial_support.application: Separate application not required; based on admission application.
financial_support.source: Provided by faculty member (major professor) from research grant/contract.

package_details.stipend: Minimum of $20,872 for each academic year
package_details.fees: Fee award scholarship: $189 applied toward student fees
package_details.health_insurance: Paid single-student health insurance, including prescription drug plan

financial_support.conditions: Contingent on satisfactory performance, degree progression, and fund availability.
